name: asset.noop
description: No-op dry-run that validates request structure without any side effects

name: asset.plan
description: Plan asset operations and return a proposed execution plan as dry-run output

name: asset.preview
description: Preview asset content or metadata without executing transformations

name: asset.validate
description: Validate asset existence, accessibility, and well-formedness

name: asset.package
description: Package assets into a distributable artifact
warnings: external Agent-S runtime not invoked in dry-run mode

name: asset.publish
description: Publish packaged assets to a target registry or repository
warnings: real publishing is not supported in dry-run mode
